programme.desc: A vicious storm kicks up, and a mayday goes out.

programme.desc: Grueling hours and vicious hazing test the greenhorns.

programme.desc: Low bait and long grinds wear down the crews, and tempers flare.

programme.desc: The captains rush to finish the season before the price of king crab drops.

programme.title: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: The captains try to top off their quotas as king crab season winds down.

programme.title: Payback Time
programme.desc: Phil reunites with the Cornelia Marie for the start of opilio crab season.

programme.title: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The fleet struggles with big seas and, for some, finding the opilio crab.

programme.title: Sea of Misery
programme.desc: The Wizard reels from a monster wave that banged up the crew.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Memories: Montana Black Bear
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince Of Wales: Fishing and Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads back to his fish shack on Prince of Wales Island in Southeast Alaska, this time with friend and colleague Morgan Fallon. Known for his cinematography, Mo now wants to switch roles from behind the camera to filling his freezer. Together, they embark on a classic Alaskan adventure: fishing for rockfish, setting shrimp pots, and hunting Sitka blacktail deer, all while reminiscing about past trips and discovering new ways the wilderness shapes them.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wyoming Sage Grouse
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Ronny Boehme head to the vast sagebrush seas of Southeast Wyoming to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Late October in Southeast Alaska finds Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman chasing Sitka blacktail deer. As the bucks begin their descent from the alpine into dense timber, the trio faces the challenge of hunting in the thick, damp rainforest. While navigating through muskeg patches and testing their luck with calling techniques, they must contend with unpredictable weather and tough terrain. When deer prove elusive, they turn to fishing and foraging.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Midway through a challenging hunt on Prince of Wales Island, Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman are searching for Sitka blacktail deer. The rut hasn't kicked in as expected, leaving the hunters frustrated and the deer elusive. Adapting their strategies, they decide to split up and quietly stalk through dense woods and muskeg. After days of patience and perseverance, a mix of skill, luck, and determination finally leads them closer to success.

programme.title: Capítulo 77
programme.desc: Alma tells Roberta that she can't stop her father from taking her away to Spain and that she loves her very much. Pilar sees Vico and Joaquín kissing.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 79
programme.desc: Mia asks her dad to stop Miguel from getting expelled after she told on him and Julieta. Esteban receives love letters and thinks they are from Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 80
programme.desc: Lulu apologizes to the students for lying. Celina asks Mia to take her place at the band's rehearsal. Vico demands that Joaquín breaks up with Pilar.

programme.title: Capítulo 81
programme.desc: Giovanni gives his support to Mia. Fearing the Lodge might hurt Julieta, Miguel breaks up with her. By request of Diego, Facundo turns down Roberta.

programme.title: Capítulo 82
programme.desc: Joaquín breaks up with Pilar because she won't sleep with him. Vico thinks that Mia told Esteban about the love letters she's been sending him. Roberta gets manipulated by Diego.

programme.title: Capítulo 83
programme.desc: Valeria pretends to be a photographer for the school to get close to Mia. Miguel warns Mia about Esteban. Roberta makes her choice of which band to stay in.

programme.title: Capítulo 84
programme.desc: Miguel and Esteban get into a fist fight. Joaquín breaks up with Vico by lying that the Lodge might come after her. However, Pilar tells Vico that Joaquín and her are dating again.

programme.title: Capítulo 85
programme.desc: Miguel admonishes Julieta for going out with her former boyfriend, who is dangerous. Valeria tells Franco she spent the day with Mia. Paola tries to seduce Diego.

programme.title: Patadas de ahogada
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Escandalo a la vista
programme.desc: The family arranges Victor's final resting. Pilar and Felina move on the emerald and cocaine businesses in Spain. Aurelio settles tempers on the left and right in Colombia. Carla is making waves on her radio show.

programme.title: El presidente un sicario
programme.desc: Filemon continues to fail Tony. Juan Carlos seeks out Ruth. Aurelio meets the President in Caracas. Monica relocates to the US and re-affirms her deal with 30-30. Felina showcases the emeralds to Spain. Ismael finds the Maras holed up.

programme.title: Caller a un testigo
programme.desc: Venezuelan President asks Aurelio for a favor. The Defense is preparing a raid. Paloma returns to Los Pinos. Tony wants to avenge Ruben. Grenas mentions the sighting of Esperanza. Aurelio wants Skinny in Honduras. The shipment gets stopped.

programme.title: Mas de una baja
programme.desc: Penumbra gets the shipment released. Omar blackmails Jaime. Pilar gets ahead of herself and Feline doesn't trust the distributor. Aurelio kills Jobless and escapes DEA. Colon sees Tata from drone photos and pinpoints the ranch.

programme.title: Rodean a los Casillas
programme.desc: Monica quarrels with BabyGirl but pays respect to see Isidro. Carmen's smitten for Ismael. Wig tracks Esperanza to Boulder. Buzzy gets free. The Army raids the ranch. Aurelio has a jet, a helicopter and a secret tunnel.

programme.title: Drones, balas y allanamiento
programme.desc: Aurelio bazookas the cocaine to avoid charges on the innocents. The wanted take refuge in the tunnel. Castillo arrests Dalvio and Tata. Pilar recognizes Raymundo as does Ruti with Colon. Dona Alba says she's through with all the killings.

programme.title: Condenados a morir
programme.desc: Salazar goes to Colorado. Alba critiques everyone on a tearfully common and crazy rant. Aurelio boots Monica out of the ranch. Ismael and Wig need to find Esperanza. Aurelio orders Scrapyard to Colorado and takes BabyGirl to Spain.

programme.title: Declara o destapan la olla
programme.desc: Zopi calls Vitaminas. Aurelio hires him. Carmen kisses Ismael. Feline and Spainish distro cat-fight ending talks before a deal can be reached. Aurelio wants to meet the Spaniard and smoothe relations. Tony and Monica have other plans.

programme.title: Rivero firma su sentencia
programme.desc: Dalvio cleans house. Carmen returns home. Ruti end things with Sebas. Rodrigo blackmails Teran into exposing Casillas. Esperanza quits the University. Tony seduces Monica. Omar asks Aurelio to kill Rivero. Aurelio tells him to stall.

programme.title: Rutila en la mira
programme.desc: Aurelio puts Isma and Dalvio to work on Rivero. Isma gets turned down by his married college advisor. Grenas locates Esperanza's car plates. Aurelio shares a night with Pilar. Filemon is on the hunt for Ruti.

programme.title: Enmudecen al informante
programme.desc: Aurelio proposes to Pilar but Eunice offends him. Rodrigo and Evelyn talk about their future. Grenas locates Rivero. Filemon attacks killing Sebas and wounding Ruti. Russians double-cross Eunice and Aurelio shoots them all down.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: El simulacro
programme.desc: Un temblor llega a la ciudad sacudiendo todos los departamentos de los vecinos. Luis les propone a los vecinos llevar a una persona de Protección civil para prepararlos ante una emergencia.

programme.title: El origen
programme.desc: Morris está en la etapa de las dudas y pregunta a sus padres cómo conquistar al amor de su vida. Alejandra y Rocko deciden contarle una historia de amor: el relato de cómo se conocieron.

programme.title: El wifi
programme.desc: Silvia instala internet de alta velocidad en su departamento, sin embargo su conexión es muy lenta; lo que no sabe es que sus vecinos saben la contraseña y todos se conectan a su red.

programme.title: El método
programme.desc: Lorena está cansada de que Frankie no consiga trabajo y a éste se le ocurre una gran idea: poner una academia de actuación basada en el Método Rivers.

programme.title: El click
programme.desc: Arturo llora porque su familia es pobre y Lorena lo consuela, Germán y Pedro creen que son amantes. Magda encuentra una nota de amor y las cosas se enredan más de la cuenta.

programme.title: La separación
programme.desc: Lorena trata de seducir a Frankie, pero él la rechaza porque está escribiendo un guión, ella lo insulta y él decide irse de su casa. Finalmente Benito regresa a casa después de 10 años.

programme.title: Benito regresa
programme.desc: Benito está de regreso después de mucho tiempo. Lalo invita a salir a Silvita y comienza a planear su futuro. A los López Pérez les cortan los servicios y dejan sin luz a media colonia.

programme.title: Los candidatos
programme.desc: Silvia y Arturo compiten para ser el presidente del vecindario. Alejandra y Rocko se preocupan porque creen que han perdido su juventud y personalidad.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies and dogs attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning but plenty of warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Missing Pistol Pursuit
programme.desc: Stop sticks are used to intercept a vehicle with more bullets than the local shooting range. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found dope sick with meth, heroin, and shattered dreams.

programme.title: Puppy Luck
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Hauling a Heater
programme.desc: Lies can't hide the truth when a stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. A suspect with his pants down has no hiding places for his alleged meth pipe.

programme.title: 2 Flats Don't Make a Right
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in felony vandalism. The truth can be fleeting when suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: Lost Love Machine
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail finds his way back behind bars after being found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' does not love being stolen.

programme.title: Red Flag
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress after a dramatic foot chase. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers have questions about how the vehicle can be started with just a house key.

programme.title: Burner Boy
programme.desc: Security guards face threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop that proves fateful.

programme.title: No Luck Nephew
programme.desc: An unsuspecting Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets during a traffic stop. Police respond to a domestic dispute as past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: She Methed Up
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud accusations between husband and wife while officers determine who's telling the truth. A woman accused of drug possession states heroin is the only thing that can heal her pain.

programme.title: Fire Hot Deputy
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cut Throat
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: Bus Stop Bandits
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.
